title: Tyler Technologies: SaaS Transition Unlocks A Significant Opportunity
text: Tyler Technologies is a leader in integrated software for the public sector, serving clients globally with an emphasis on government entities. The company is transitioning to a cloud-first model, aiming for 90+% recurring revenues, operating margins of 30%, and 20+% free cash flow margins by 2030. Tyler maintains robust financial growth with accelerating revenue and high free cash flow, primarily attributed to SaaS growth and governmental transition to new platforms.

title: 7 Stocks in Hot Water: Dump This Dead Weight as Costs Skyrocket
text: Although a topic that arouses myriad emotions, targeting overvalued stocks to sell represents an important component of investing strategy. Since we're in the middle of baseball season, you can't always let sentimental favorites dictate your lineup.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Public Safety Suite Selected by Oregon Police
text: The implementation of TYL's Enterprise Public Safety suite is likely to help Oregon State Police accelerate and improve emergency response time and accuracy for law enforcement, fire and medical services.

title: Oregon State Police Selects Tyler Technologies' Enterprise Public Safety Solutions
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed a ten-year agreement with the Oregon State Police for Tyler's Enterprise Public Safety suite.

title: Tyler Technologies Shares 2023 Investor Day Presentation Link
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies shares its 2023 Investor Day presentation link.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Solutions to Streamline Branson City Operations
text: The City of Branson, MO, selects Tyler's (TYL) Enterprise ERP and EPL solutions to streamline operations and improve community services.

title: Branson, Missouri, Selects Tyler Technologies' Enterprise ERP and Enterprise Permitting & Licensing Solutions
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it signed an agreement with the city of Branson, MO, for multiple applications from Tyler's Public Administration suite.

title: Tyler Technologies Shares 2023 Investor Day Webcast Link
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies shares the live webcast link for its 2023 Investor Day on June 15, 2023.

title: City of Austin, Texas, Launches Open Data Portal with Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the city of Austin, Texas, successfully launched a comprehensive Enterprise Data Platform to enhance data accessibility.
